source: Jeff Sackmann Match Charting Project (CC BY-NC-SA 4.0)
note: Based on 9,500+ ATP charted matches. Attribution required for all use.

recreational_advanced_benchmarks.note: Benchmarks for advanced recreational players - Fernando level

fernando_real_performance.note: Fernando 69% win rate above 50% recreational benchmark

fernando_targets.key_insight: Reducing unforced errors below 18 per match is highest-leverage improvement

recovery_performance_correlation.note: Derived from Fernando real Whoop + match data cross-reference
recovery_performance_correlation.insight: Fernando wins 75% of matches when recovery above 80% vs 40% when below 65%

sport_science_baselines.sleep_performance_impact: Each hour below 7h reduces reaction time by ~3% and increases injury risk by 1.7x
